heading: Accelerated schedule for isolating high-level nuclear waste at the Defense Waste Processing Facility, Savannah River Site
label: 6211 Accelerated schedule for isolating high-level nuclear waste at the Defense Waste Processing Facility, Savannah River Site
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , War and National Defense, prior to repeal by .section 2631 of Title 50Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(1)

children.text: will achieve long-term cost savings to the Federal Government; and
could accelerate the removal and isolation of high-level nuclear waste from long-term storage tanks at the site.
